items.title: Union Minister for Finance and Corporate Affairs delivers keynote address at 38th SEBI Foundation Day celebrations
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Finance Union Minister for Finance and Corporate Affairs delivers keynote address at 38th SEBI Foundation Day celebrations Smt. Sitharaman cautions SEBI and all regulated entities to enhance cyber security measures for emerging global challenges SEBI should invest very substantially in public awareness on every major platform in regional languages: Union Finan…
